title: filter_presence Unknown variant: type allows invalid filter, guard not visible at definition site
description: ContactPresence::Unknown is a deserialization catch-all with no filter semantics, but filter_presence is typed Option<ContactPresence> which structurally allows it. The InvalidArgument runtime guard exists in contact.rs but is invisible at the struct definition site. A contributor adding a new query method that copies this struct pattern will omit the guard and silently send invalid filter values to the server.
